Hieracium spp. is a genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) characterized by their yellow or white dandelion-like flowers and a range of bitter, medicinal properties. 

The health benefits of Hieracium spp. include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. 

The bioactive constituents of Hieracium spp. include sesquiterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

Hieracium spp. is often used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
